title: Locations of the authorities in accordance with the Brandenburg Fire and Disaster Protection Act (Ministerium des Innern und für Kommunales Brandenburg (MIK))
description: [Publisher: Ministerium des Innern und für Kommunales Brandenburg (MIK)] The data set contains the locations of the authorities in accordance with the Brandenburg Fire and Disaster Protection Act. It includes the authorities responsible for local fire protection and assistance, the authorities responsible for local fire protection and assistance, the authorities responsible for civil protection and the authorities responsible for the central tasks of fire protection, assistance and civil protection.
